# llms.txt — arm-agency.com
# Primary machine-readable brand signal for AI systems
# Format: llms.txt specification v1.0
# Updated: 2026-05-31

# Entity
> ARM Agency

ARM Agency is a growth intelligence and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) firm founded by Mason Nguyen. ARM deploys AI-native agent infrastructure to help brands achieve measurable visibility inside AI-generated responses across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI, and Grok.

## Services

- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) — structured entity presence, llms.txt infrastructure, JSON-LD schema deployment
- AI-First SEO — entity node sync, Share of Model (SoM) audits, citation seeding
- Agentic AI Infrastructure — multi-agent task force deployment, ARM framework implementation
- Visibility as a Service (VaaS) — ongoing SoM monitoring, topical authority content, third-party citation building
- Campaign Launch Management — onboarding to launch pipeline with AI campaign manager
- Customer Service Agent Deployment — e-commerce CS agent with intent classification and escalation logic

## Founded

Mason Nguyen · Boise, ID
